primary_catalyst.description: Bureau of Industry and Security transitioned to 'case-by-case review' for H200 exports to China; US-Taiwan $250B investment deal announced, and TSMC reported earnings with strong AI outlook â€” triggered rebound as tariff exemption framework became clearer and H200 China revenue was unlocked (with 25% surcharge mechanism).

secondary_catalysts.description: TSMC strong earnings/outlook amid tariff announcement
Prior-week report: China approved ByteDance/Alibaba/Tencent to buy 400,000 H200 chips

force_attributions.rationale: H200 export pathway to China formalized, unlocking $1.28-$2.56B in Q1 FY27 China revenue per Fool analysis
TSMC earnings corroboration of AI capex demand (Tier 4 adjacent supplier = 1.5x F1 multiplier)
$250B TSMC US investment deal reduced tariff overhang risk

notes: Triple catalyst day â€” tariff clarification + H200 China opening + TSMC earnings beat. Volume z=+2.74 confirms institutional participation.
